title: Graph Neural Networks (GNN) sebagai Ekstraktor Fitur
scope: The learned end for graphs. GNNs as representation learners.
key_concepts: Node2Vec learns structural embeddings but ignores node attributes (like a user's age or a paper's text). Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) combine both graph structure and node attributes.
GNNs operate via 'message passing'. A node updates its own feature vector by aggregating the feature vectors of its neighbors.
Through multiple layers, a node gathers information from neighbors, then neighbors of neighbors, creating a highly contextualized learned representation.
The output of the final GNN layer can be extracted as a feature vector (an embedding) to be used in standard pipelines, or trained end-to-end.

definitions.meaning: Mekanisme komputasi dalam GNN di mana setiap simpul mengumpulkan dan menggabungkan vektor fitur dari simpul-simpul tetangganya.

examples: Predicting molecule toxicity: atoms are nodes, bonds are edges. A GNN aggregates features (atom type, charge) across bonds, outputting a graph-level embedding that captures the molecule's overall chemical properties.
latex_equations: Persamaan *message passing* pada lapisan GNN ke-$k$ untuk memperbarui representasi simpul $v$: $\mathbf{h}_v^{(k)} = \sigma \left( \mathbf{W}^{(k)} \sum_{u \in \mathcal{N}(v)} \frac{\mathbf{h}_u^{(k-1)}}{|\mathcal{N}(v)|} + \mathbf{B}^{(k)} \mathbf{h}_v^{(k-1)} \right)$

figures.caption: Mekanisme message passing pada Graph Neural Network.
figures.description: Ilustrasi simpul merah yang menerima pesan (vektor) dari tiga simpul tetangga biru, kemudian memproses pesan tersebut menggunakan jaringan saraf untuk memperbarui representasinya sendiri.

exclude: Spectral graph convolutions (GCN math in the Fourier domain), GraphSAGE vs GAT intricacies.
relations: The fully learned counterpart to s05's manual neighborhood aggregation.
